taxonomy: Libanothamnus occultus is a species within the genus Libanothamnus, which is a member of the family Celastraceae. The family Celastraceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet or staff tree family. The Celastraceae family is part of the larger clade of angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants. Libanothamnus occultus is a unique species found in its native range and has distinct characteristics that set it apart from other members of the family. The classification of Libanothamnus occultus provides a framework for understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
